case_title: RAMESH G. NARAN vs. COOMER, ROBERT K. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMESH G. NARAN SERVED JUN-22-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COOMER, ROBERT K.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMESH G. NARAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOMER, ROBERT K. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: ROOM 544, 439 JONES ST, S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED
